Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Mar-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FORREST MILLARD, JOAN MILLARD, and, SAINT CLOUD HOTEL'S Motion for Change of Venue from San Francisco Superior Court, County of San Francisco, to Superior Court of California for the County of Contra Costa.. Appearances: J. Edward Marshall, Esq., of the Law Offices of J. Edward Marshall, (510) 758-1266, appearing for Defendants Forrest Brad Millard, Joan Millard and Saint Cloud Hotel, and moving party. There are no other appearances. Counsel is appearing to have Order signed. The Court amended its tentative ruling as follows: The motion is Granted, proof of service is provided at the hearing. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
